final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing brand color palette and typography specification sheet for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy and traditional Chinese dyeing aesthetics.

Style/medium: needs a refined East-Asian brand identity aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a brand specification layout showing primary colors, secondary/accent colors, and typography specimens in clearly divided sections
Subject: must include:
  — Primary color swatches (main palette)
  — Secondary / accent color swatches (supporting palette)
  — Typography specimens showing brand name "染秋" and "RAN QIU" in selected typefaces
  — Brief specimen lines referencing the core fragrance series: 桂花乌龙 / 琥珀枫叶 / 柿霜暮色
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean brand-sheet backdrop — exact surface treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, contemplative atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a palette drawn from autumn seasonal references — 桂花 gold, 柿子 persimmon orange, 枫叶 deep red, 乌龙茶 earthy brown, 檀香 warm beige, 琥珀 amber — exact hex values, ratios, and swatch arrangement are yours
Materials/textures: needs a subtle paper or textile texture evoking traditional 染 (dyeing) craft — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" / "RAN QIU" / "桂花乌龙" / "琥珀枫叶" / "柿霜暮色" / "染秋以东方哲学观照自然更迭"
Constraints: must preserve the brand's dual identity — Chinese characters and Latin romanization coexisting; color and typography sections must be visually distinct
Avoid: overly Western minimalism that erases the Eastern craft identity; neon or cold tones
